flash_cards.topic_name: Areas of Sector and Segment of a Circle (X-11.1)

cards.text:
Area of segment of a circle
= Area of the corresponding sector - Area of the corresponding triangle.
cards.topic_name: Areas of Sector and Segment of a Circle (X-11.1)

cards.text: Area of a sector of a circle with radius r and angle with degrees measure {tex}\theta{/tex} is {tex}\frac{\theta}{360} \times \pi r^{2}{/tex}.
cards.topic_name: Areas of Sector and Segment of a Circle (X-11.1)

cards.text: Length of an arc of a sector of a circle with radius r and angle with degree measure {tex}\theta{/tex} is {tex}\frac{\theta}{360} \times 2 \pi r{/tex}.
cards.topic_name: Areas of Sector and Segment of a Circle (X-11.1)
